message:
feat: add per-panel terminal inspector with WebSocket push

- Each panel has its own inspector (⌘⌥I to toggle)
- Inspector communicates via panel WebSocket, not polling
- Shows terminal size data from Ghostty C API (cols, rows, screen/cell size)
- Dock icon dropdown to hide/show tab bar
- Inspector resizable via drag handle
- Terminal reflows when inspector shows/hides/resizes
